sections.label: Context & Background
sections.value: Mobile checkout redesign is on a tight 8-week timeline. Cross-functional dependency on the payments team (Stripe migration in flight separately). Mobile team is also covering on-call rotations.

sections.label: Key Inputs
sections.value: Stripe deprecation forces a parallel migration. iOS 18 changed PassKit autofill behavior; tested only on simulator. Customer support reported a spike in 'cart cleared' complaints from older Android devices last week.

sections.label: Constraints & Considerations
sections.value: Cannot pause the Stripe migration. Cannot ship a regression to web checkout. Q2 board review on June 28 — risks must be quantified by then.
